description: A Victorian Rose is a restored 1891 Victorian vacation home in Grass Valley's Downtown Historic District. Four bedrooms, a hot tub, and 'antique & eclectic furnishings' sleep groups of up to twelve — 'Don't Just Stay, Play!!' in their words.

Alta Sierra Wine Shop is a wine shop and tasting room on Alta Sierra Drive in Grass Valley. Its mission, in their words: 'to search out, evaluate, and purchase beautiful wines, and then share those discoveries with you' — a 'cozy, friendly shop' for tastings and flights.
Bicycle Thief is a restaurant on East Main Street in Grass Valley, featured in MUSE's 'Rural is the New Cool.'
Bubba's Bagels is a bagel shop on Sutton Way in Grass Valley.
Choquiero Cacao Cafe is a cacao cafe on Broad Street in Nevada City, featured in MUSE's 'Seasons in the GVNC Cultural District.'
The Dew Drop Inn is a Grass Valley venue on Cerrito Road, listed among KVMR's event venues.
Enrique's Lounge is a lounge on East Main Street in Grass Valley.

Golden Era Lounge is a cocktail bar and lounge on Broad Street in Nevada City with a 'vibrant music scene.' Artists perform 'original, vintage classic & contemporary scores' spanning jazz, blues, R&B, funk, world, and soul.
MAK's BBQ is a barbecue spot on Alta Sierra Drive in Grass Valley.
The Nevada Club stands at 108 West Main Street in Grass Valley.
Sushi Q is a sushi restaurant on Commercial Street in Nevada City, where reservations are taken by phone.

The National Bar is the tavern of the National Exchange Hotel on Broad Street in Nevada City — 'a Legendary Haunt,' in their words. Beers on tap, cask ales, well-made cocktails, and a small menu of shareable snacks under 'dark, seductive décor.'
Wyld Tiger is a sourdough bakery on West Main Street in Grass Valley, featured in MUSE's 'Rural is the New Cool.'

Hola! Tortilla makes fresh corn and flour tortillas in Nevada City from 'organic nixtamalized white corn masa' with minimal ingredients. 'Locally Made in Nevada County' and preservative-free, its tortillas also supply school lunch programs and commercial kitchens.

The Olive Groove is a specialty food shop and tasting room on Mill Street in Grass Valley, pouring extra virgin olive oils and balsamic vinegars alongside seasonings and charcuterie. Everything, they say, 'is selected as best in class' from 'local and global artisans.'

Arbor Tahoe is the flagship store for Arbor Snowboards and Skateboards on Donner Pass Road in Truckee. It carries 'wood snowboards, skateboards, and apparel' made with 'environmentally friendly natural materials,' staffed by 'Truckee and Tahoe natives.'
Café Lupine is a cafe on Brockway Road in Truckee.
Crazy 4 Yogurt is a frozen yogurt shop on Commercial Avenue in Penn Valley.
Donner Lake Kitchen is an eatery on Donner Pass Road in Truckee.
Good Wolf Brewing is a brewery on Industrial Way in Truckee.
MakiAli is a sushi restaurant on Donner Pass Road in Truckee, serving nigiri and maki rolls for dine-in and to-go.
Mehfil Indian Bistro is an Indian restaurant on Deerfield Drive in Truckee.
Spring Poke & Sushi is a poke and sushi spot on Deerfield Drive in Truckee.
Tack Room Restaurant and Bar is a restaurant and bar on Penn Valley Drive in Penn Valley.
Trokay is a restaurant on Donner Pass Road in Truckee. Its site points to a team of chefs, dining by reservation, special events, and private dining.
Sticks Market is a market on Donner Pass Road in Truckee.

Z Market Place is a neighborhood market and deli in Truckee's Tahoe Donner area. Shelves run from fresh produce and pantry staples to 'a wide selection of libations,' with a made-to-order deli 'where flavor meets freshness.'
